response.justification: While the candidate has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, there is no demonstrable depth in JVM ecosystems, enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, or IDE internals — key requirements for this role. His Java exposure is minimal and buried in old roles, with no evidence of Spring, Hibernate, build tool integration, or IDE subsystem development.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and platforms
Proven experience building developer tooling and open-source projects
Excellent communication and workshop leadership in technical domains
concerns: Lack of recent or deep Java/Kotlin enterprise framework experience
No evidence of IDE internals, language server protocol, or JVM tooling work
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not JVM-based enterprise systems
